description_long: This is a hardcover book with a textured, deep red cover that mimics the look of leather. The front cover features gold embossed text, while the back cover displays a block of gold text in a decorative font. The spine is also red with gold text running vertically, including the year '1990' and a small logo. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with visible white pages sandwiched between the covers. The overall design is classic and elegant, with a vintage or collector's edition feel.
description: A red, leather-textured hardcover book with gold embossed text and a classic, vintage appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the top edge, showing the thickness and the white pages between the red covers.
description_view_1: The back cover is visible, featuring a large block of gold text on a textured red background.
description_view_2: The spine is shown, with gold text, the year '1990', and a small logo, all oriented vertically.
description_view_3: The front cover is visible, displaying gold embossed title text on a red, leather-like surface.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is red with a textured pattern, featuring gold text oriented vertically, including the title, year '1990', and a small logo near the top. The design is simple and classic, with no additional decorative elements.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, white logo is visible on the lower right of the front cover and near the top of the spine, featuring a stylized 'L' and a graphic element.
